title: quercus jinpinensis
intro: Quercus jinpinensis, also known as Jinpi oak or Jinpi Chinese oak, is a species of flowering plant in the beech family Fagaceae. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Quercus jinpinensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and protecting against cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Quercus jinpinensis are typically made by infusing the dried leaves or bark in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
